# Try to open the provided helper file; if not present, fall back to the uploaded file path.
import os, json, re, textwrap, sys, pathlib

candidates = [
    "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt",
    "/mnt/data/file-4Ez2juidGgiN1XrxjjBYCN-Q090.txt"
]

path = None
for p in candidates:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        path = p
        break

path, os.path.exists(path), os.listdir("/mnt/data")[:10]

# Read the text
with open("/mnt/data/file-4Ez2juidGgiN1XrxjjBYCN-Q090.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:2000]

# Extract quoted segments and their spans excluding the double quotes.
# We'll pair each quoted segment with the immediate source in parentheses following it.
import re

# pattern to capture quoted text and the following parenthetical (if present)
pattern = re.compile(r'"([^"]+)"\s*(\([^)]+\))?')

matches = []
for m in pattern.finditer(text):
    start = m.start(1) # inside quotes
    end = m.end(1)     # end of inner content
    quoted = m.group(1)
    paren = m.group(2) or ""
    matches.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": quoted,
        "following_parenthetical": paren,
        "context_start": max(0, start-80),
        "context": text[max(0, start-80):min(len(text), end+80)]
    })

len(matches), matches[:3]

# Continue displaying all matches to confirm the rest
matches

queries: من قرأ القرآن وَلَمْ يَتَدَبَّرْهُ فَكَأَنَّمَا أَمَّرَ النَّاسَ عَلَى الضَّلَالَةِ رواه مسلم
القرآن يُتلى عليكم، فإذا أردتم أن تفهموه فاقرءوه وإذا أردتم أن تعلموه فتدبروه رواه أبو داود
إِنَّ الدَّينَ يُتَضاعَفُ لِلَّذينَ يُدَبِّرُونَهُ رواه الترمذي
سورة محمد الآية 1 الذين كفروا وصدوا عن سبيل الله أضل أعمالهم
سورة الأنعام الآية 154 ثم آتينا موسى الكتاب تمامًا على الذي أحسن
كِتَابٌ أَنْزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَارَكٌ لِيَدَّبَّرُوا آيَاتِهِ 38:29
الذين كفروا وصدوا عن سبيل الله أضل أعمالهم سورة محمد 1 نص
"من قرأ القرآن ولم يتدبره" في صحيح مسلم
القرآن يُتلى عليكم فإذا أردتم أن تفهموه فاقرؤوه وإذا أردتم أن تعلموه فتدبروه في سنن أبي داود
عادة النبي أن يقرأ القرآن على رأسه ويتدبر به صحيح البخاري

action.query: من قرأ القرآن ولم يتدبره فكأنما أمر الناس على الضلالة
من قرأ القرآن ولم يتدبره لا أصل له

output.code:
# Build the citations JSON according to the schema, using the previously extracted matches.
import json

matches = [
 {'span_start': 162, 'span_end': 243, 'span_text': 'من قرأ القرآن وَلَمْ يَتَدَبَّرْهُ فَكَأَنَّمَا أَمَّرَ النَاسَ عَلَى الضَّلالَةِ', 'following_parenthetical': '(رواه مسلم)'},
 {'span_start': 326, 'span_end': 439, 'span_text': 'القرآن يُتلى عليكم، فَإِذا أَرَدتُمُ أَنْ تُفْهِموهُ فَاقْرَءُوهُ وَإِذا أَرَدتُمُ أَنْ تَعْلَموهُ فَتَدَبَّروْهُ', 'following_parenthetical': '(رواه أبو داود)'},
 {'span_start': 524, 'span_end': 573, 'span_text': 'إِنَّ الدَينَ يُتَضاعَفُ لِلَّذينَ يُدَبِّرُونَهُ', 'following_parenthetical': '(رواه الترمذي)'},
 {'span_start': 642, 'span_end': 714, 'span_text': 'وَتَعَلَّموا مِنْهُ مَا تُدْرِكُ بِهِ فُؤَادُكُمْ وَأَورَثَهُ عَلَيْكُمْ', 'following_parenthetical': '(الأنعام: 154)'},
 {'span_start': 735, 'span_end': 791, 'span_text': 'وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلنَّبِيِّ مُذْ تَجَلَّى', 'following_parenthetical': '(محمد: 1)'},
 {'span_start': 835, 'span_end': 924, 'span_text': 'كانت عادَةُ النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم أن يُقرَأَ القُرآنُ عَلى رَأْسِهِ وَيُتَدَبَّرَ بِهِ', 'following_parenthetical': '(صحيح البخاري)'},
 {'span_start': 970, 'span_end': 1048, 'span_text': 'كان النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يُقرَأُ القُرآنُ عَلى رَأْسِهِ وَيُتَدَبَّرَ بِهِ', 'following_parenthetical': '(صحيح مسلم)'},
]

# Map surah names to numbers for those cited
sura_map = {"الأنعام": 6, "محمد": 47}

citations = []
for m in matches:
    src = m['following_parenthetical']
    is_aya = any(name in src for name in sura_map.keys())
    
    if is_aya:
        # Parse sura and aya number from parentheses like "(الأنعام: 154)"
        try:
            inner = src.strip("()")
            sura_name, aya_num_str = [part.strip() for part in inner.split(":")]
            aya_num = int(aya_num_str)
            sura_num = sura_map.get(sura_name, None)
        except Exception:
            sura_name, sura_num, aya_num = "", None, None
        
        # corrected_text from authoritative text (we'll fill according to known verses)
        if sura_name == "الأنعام" and aya_num == 154:
            corrected = "ثُمَّ آتَيْنَا مُوسَى الْكِتَابَ تَمَامًا عَلَى الَّذِي أَحْسَنَ وَتَفْصِيلًا لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةً لَعَلَّهُمْ بِلِقَاءِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ"
        elif sura_name == "محمد" and aya_num == 1:
            corrected = "الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَصَدُّوا عَنْ سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ أَضَلَّ أَعْمَالَهُمْ"
        else:
            corrected = "خطأ"
        
        citations.append({
            "span_start": m['span_start'],
            "span_end": m['span_end'],
            "span_text": m['span_text'],
            "citation_type": "Aya",
            "is_valid": False,
            "aya_reference": {
                "sura_name": sura_name,
                "sura_number": sura_num,
                "aya_number": aya_num
            },
            "hadeeth_reference": {},
            "corrected_text": corrected,
            "completely_invalid": False if corrected != "خطأ" else True
        })
    else:
        citations.append({
            "span_start": m['span_start'],
            "span_end": m['span_end'],
            "span_text": m['span_text'],
            "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
            "is_valid": False,
            "aya_reference": {},
            "hadeeth_reference": {},
            "corrected_text": "خطأ",
            "completely_invalid": True
        })

output = {"citations": citations}
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
